opportunity.title: SBIR autonomous vehicle fleet charging infrastructure grant
opportunity.summary: Non-dilutive SBIR funding for small businesses building robotics, autonomous vehicle fleet-servicing systems, and EV charging infrastructure.
opportunity.eligibility: U.S. small businesses developing advanced manufacturing, robotics, clean-energy, and smart-city infrastructure technologies may apply.

opportunity.title: California zero-emission fleet infrastructure incentive
opportunity.summary: Projected state incentive for EV charging depots, fleet infrastructure, and clean transportation deployment.
opportunity.eligibility: Companies deploying clean transportation infrastructure in California may qualify when a new NOFO opens.
